payload.hypothesis: Try a smaller 3-layer GNN predecoder with gated MLP messages and soft-prior outputs to avoid the hard-flip gradient failure while still giving the classical OSD backend a useful learned prior.
payload.rationale: Branch exp/20260424-155219/01-try-a-compact-neural-bp-predecoder-that- produced no gain over baseline, while exp/20260424-155219/02-try-a-small-4-layer-gnn-predecoder-with- failed with a non-differentiable hard-flip path. A smaller soft-prior GNN keeps the same family as 02 but removes the gradient trap and should be cheaper than a deeper variant.
